laws.title: Intuitive Navigation
laws.description: Ensure the navigation layout is straightforward to enhance the user's journey across the site.
laws.remediation: Conduct usability testing to revise and optimize the navigation structure.

laws.title: Responsive Design
laws.description: The site should provide a seamless experience across all devices.
laws.remediation: Adapt grid systems and flexbox designs to improve responsiveness.

laws.title: Search Functionality
laws.description: Provide a robust search feature that can accurately predict and suggest results.
laws.remediation: Incorporate AI-driven search algorithms for enhanced search capabilities.

laws.title: Checkout Process Simplification
laws.description: Streamline the checkout process to ensure it is as quick and simple for users as possible.
laws.remediation: Reduce the number of checkout pages and include a progress indicator.

laws.title: Clear Call-to-Actions
laws.description: Call-to-actions (CTAs) should be prominently displayed and encourage user interaction.
laws.remediation: Design CTAs with contrasting colors and strategic positioning on the pages.
